scripts.build: node scripts/fetch-feeds.mjs && node scripts/update-price-history.mjs && node scripts/parse-coupons.mjs && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/prerender.mjs && node scripts/generate-redirects.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.build:no-fetch: node scripts/parse-coupons.mjs && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/prerender.mjs && node scripts/generate-redirects.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
